query_normalized: predicting chemical reaction yields from spectroscopic data with attention mechanisms chemistry
rationale: The paper focuses on predicting temperature distributions from emission spectroscopy in gas mixtures, which is a distinct physical construct and domain (combustion diagnostics/thermometry) compared to the user's question about predicting chemical reaction yields from spectroscopic data.
